section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

section.name: Introduction
section.p: The brXM Discovery plugin integrates Bloomreach Discovery with brXM 16.7.0, providing CMS picker tooling, shared configuration resolution, CRISP-backed service clients, and HST components for search, category browse, recommendations, autosuggest, product detail, and pixel tracking.

tr.td: CMS node types, picker REST endpoints, Open UI extensions, and Discovery bootstrap config.
Site runtime entry point: HST components, CRISP-backed clients, templates, and pixel service.
Shared exceptions, configuration model, and request/query support used across runtimes.
Bundled HCM site bootstrap for the plugin's templates and HST resources.
Standalone reference implementation showing the plugin wired into a runnable brXM project.

ol.li: Install the plugin artifacts into the CMS runtime and site runtime.
Follow the quick start to enable CRISP, add credentials, and wire a search page.

tr.td: Search and category browse data components, shared view components, and highlight components.
Widget-driven recommendation delivery, v1/v2 Pathways behaviour, and PDP band mode.
Inline typeahead behaviour exposed by DiscoverySearchComponent.
CMS editor integrations for products, widgets, categories, and live category preview.
Global config node, structural defaults, channel overrides, CRISP spaces, and cache behaviour.
Environment, system property, and JCR precedence with deployment guidance for secrets.
